title: Tag System
subtitle: Unified registry for both message context tags and tool routing tags
tagNameHint: Only lowercase letters, digits, underscores, hyphens, and colons allowed
noCustomTags: No custom tags yet. Click "Create Tag" to add one.
builtinTooltip: Built-in tags are defined by the system and cannot be deleted
sectionBuiltinDesc: Defined by the system, covering both message context and tool routing purposes
sectionCustomDesc: Created by you. Can be referenced by tools or used as message context tags
sourceMessageTooltip: Embedded in messages as [key:value], readable by the LLM
sourceToolTooltip: Registered as a routing tag on tools; PFC activates matching tools when detected
goCreateTag: Go to Tag System to create new tags
